description_long: This is a modern, angular combat tactical vehicle with a matte black finish and a faceted, armored exterior. The body features sharp geometric lines and reinforced panels, giving it a stealthy, aggressive appearance. The vehicle has four large, rugged off-road tires with deep treads, suitable for urban and rough terrain. The front grille is wide and robust, flanked by angular headlights and a small emblem at the center. The windows are narrow and likely reinforced, and the rear features vertical taillights with red accents. There are no visible weapon mounts, but the design suggests a focus on protection and mobility in urban environments.
description: A matte black, angular combat tactical vehicle with reinforced panels and rugged off-road tires, designed for urban operations. Its faceted body and narrow windows emphasize protection and stealth.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, angular grille, sharp headlights, and a small emblem at the center.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the faceted body panels, two doors, and large off-road tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displays vertical red-accented taillights and a robust, armored back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing geometric paneling and rugged tires.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular, sloped armor panels; no modular or reactive features visible.
attribute_military_markings: Small yellow emblem on the front grille and rear; no other markings visible.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; appear reinforced.
